parameters.query:
SELECT
  DATE(o.order_date)   AS sale_date,
  o.order_id,
  c.name               AS customer_name,
  ct.cat_name          AS cat_name,
  p.p_name             AS product_name,
  od.quantity          AS qty,
  od.price             AS unit_price,
  od.subtotal          AS subtotal,
  o.payment_status     AS payment_status,
  o.payment_method     AS payment_method,
  o.order_status       AS shipping_status
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c       ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_details od  ON o.order_id = od.order_id
JOIN product p         ON od.p_id = p.p_id
JOIN category ct       ON p.cat_id = ct.cat_id
WHERE DATE(o.order_date) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY o.order_id, od.id;

parameters.query:
SELECT p.p_name, c.cat_name, p.p_stock
FROM product p
JOIN category c ON p.cat_id = c.cat_id
WHERE p.p_stock < 6;

parameters.query:
SELECT
  od.id AS order_detail_id,  -- ✅ ใช้เป็น Key Column (ถาวร)
  DATE(o.order_date) AS sale_date,
  o.order_id,
  c.name AS customer_name,
  c.phone AS customer_phone,
  c.address AS shipping_address,
  ct.cat_name AS cat_name,
  p.p_name AS product_name,
  od.quantity AS qty,
  od.price AS unit_price,
  od.subtotal AS subtotal,
  o.payment_status AS payment_status,
  o.payment_method AS payment_method,
  o.order_status AS shipping_status
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c  ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id
JOIN product p    ON od.p_id = p.p_id
JOIN category ct  ON p.cat_id = ct.cat_id
ORDER BY o.order_date, o.order_id, od.id;

SELECT 
    p.p_id,
    p.p_name AS product_name,
    ct.cat_name AS category_name,
    SUM(od.quantity) AS total_qty_sold
FROM orders o
JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id
JOIN product p ON od.p_id = p.p_id
JOIN category ct ON p.cat_id = ct.cat_id
WHERE 
    o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    AND o.order_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND o.payment_status = 'ชำระเงินแล้ว'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_id,
    p.p_name,
    ct.cat_name
ORDER BY total_qty_sold DESC;
